title: Pyoderma gangrenosum - NHS
text:
um if you have certain conditions, including:
inflammatory bowel disease , such as ulcerative colitis or Crohn's disease rheumatoid arthritis certain blood disorders, such as myelodysplastic syndrome hepatitis Behçet's disease You may also be more likely to get pyoderma gangrenosum if you take certain medicines.
Page last reviewed: 21 March 2024
Next review due: 21 March 2027
